h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought it was just outside the rules because people correct it so fast.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: But that repeated-versus-right-now difference does seem like a pattern.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to answer the tutor's question about the correct 'right-now' form and continue analyzing the linguistic contrast.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I thought significance was enough to call it an important improvement. But here the p-value only seems to clear the noise question, not the size of the shift.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to progressively refine their understanding of statistical significance versus practical importance in response to the tutor's prompts.
The learner will continue to refine the label's wording to balance the sudden floods with the slow, gradual process of river erosion.
The learner will continue to struggle with and express confusion over the distinction between 'not guilty' and 'did not do it'.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: these clipped saplings make that feel incomplete
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to progressively refine their understanding of the ecological balance under the tutor's guidance.
The learner will continue to express uncertainty about how the balance proves the salt is still there.
